frames.label: Settle
frames.description: Phase 1 of 3: settle into a friendly ready pose, keeping the full body centered and the identity unchanged.

frames.label: Small motion
frames.description: Phase 2 of 3: make one small upbeat idle motion while preserving the face, silhouette, palette, and camera.

frames.label: Return
frames.description: Phase 3 of 3: gently return to the same ready pose for a seamless friendly loop.

frames.label: Relax
frames.description: Phase 1 of 3: settle into a comfortable relaxed pose with a soft, unhurried expression.

frames.label: Drift
frames.description: Phase 2 of 3: add one slow, gentle sway or blink without changing the character design.

frames.label: Rest
frames.description: Phase 3 of 3: ease back to the same restful pose for a calm seamless loop.

frames.label: Prepare
frames.description: Phase 1 of 3: prepare the line-specific signature action with a friendly, contained gesture and no combat intent.

frames.label: Signature action
frames.description: Phase 2 of 3: perform the line-specific signature action clearly while keeping the same centered full-body identity.

frames.label: Finish
frames.description: Phase 3 of 3: finish the gentle signature action and return toward the starting pose without adding scenery.
